name: moodboard-capture
description: Capture inspiration assets, build reusable taste-memory profiles, open local ingredient boards, derive design directions, and plan landing pages from a repo moodboard folder or personal inbox.

interface.shortDescription: Save inspiration, open a local ingredient board, derive design directions, and plan landing pages from real references.
interface.longDescription: Captures a desktop full-page screenshot for a URL or imports a local image, saves it into a moodboard library, builds per-item taste interpretation, generates per-reference design docs, opens a fast local ingredient board, synthesizes reusable directions, and writes landing-page briefs plus provenance artifacts when analysis is available.
defaultPrompt: Save https://example.com to my moodboard and explain what makes the design work.
Generate a design.md for that saved reference and focus on typography plus components.
Open my moodboard as an ingredient board.
Derive design directions from my moodboard and plan a landing page in the warm-technical direction.
